objective: Run the Foundation /GOAL HEADLESS TRIAD against github.com/gretjia/turing to the highest mechanically provable no-human state by setting up the omega-vm and GitHub test environments, adding the Rust authority-kernel workspace and supply-chain lockfile to this repo, preserving non-authority headless wrappers, and emitting honest NOT_RUN/BLOCKED artifacts only for remaining human-only or externally unavailable gates.
abort_conditions: Any edit to the constitution, root project book, contracts, or src authority/runtime files.
Any claim of HUMAN_RATIFIED, OG10_SIGNED, FOUNDATION_READY, M2_ENABLED, or implementer-origin CLOSED.
Any GateResult product PASS with exit_status != 0, any NOT_RUN entry, missing command/input/output/tool digest, missing clean fixture evidence, or missing tampered fixture evidence.
Any launch-path closure claim without clean clone plus real Linux plus pinned runsc RED/GREEN evidence.
Any Claude final-ratifier invocation before Grok G12-A PASS.
